ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT TOSCO REFINING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DENIED. THE COURT MAY NOT GRANT SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO AN ISSUE OF DAMAGES UNLESS IT DISPOSES OF AN ENTIRE CAUSE OF ACTION OR IS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (DECASTRO WEST CHADOROW & BURNS, INC. V. SUPERIOR COURT (1996) 47 CAL.APP.4TH 410; CCP S 437C(F)(1)). A MOTION SEEKING TO EXCLUDE ONLY NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES DOES NOT DISPOSE OF AN ENTIRE CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE A PLAINTIFF MIGHT STILL OBTAIN ECONOMIC DAMAGES. IN ALL EVENTS, DEFENDANT FAILED TO SATISFY ITS INTIAL BURDEN OF PRODUCTION SINCE IT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT POSSESS AND COULD NOT REASONABLY OBTAIN EVIDENCE FROM PERSONS OTHER THAN MR. NAYLOR TO PROVE NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, LAVENA WARD CSR #7707
